Text.text:
## Retrieved Twin's API Blueprint

Fetched the full technical specification for Twin's REST API, outlining how to manage AI agents, automations, runs, schedules, webhooks, and workspaces programmatically.

> **Key Note:** All API calls require an `x-api-key` header for authentication—create keys via the Twin UI first.

## Core Capabilities

- **Agents:** Create, list, retrieve, delete, update instructions, manage runs, schedules, and webhooks.
- **Runs:** Start new runs, list history, cancel, view events, and delete.
- **Workspaces:** Create, list, update, delete, and reorder.
- **Schedules:** Set cron-based triggers, pause/resume, list.
- **Other:** API keys, instructions history, move agents between workspaces.

The API powers production automations at Twin's platform.


Visit the Twin site for an overview:

[[embed:0]]

operation.Set: build.twin.so 需要 x-api-key header，不是 Bearer

RunToolCall.title: 提取 build.twin.so 路径清单

ExecuteJs.comment: 提取 build.twin.so 路径清单

Text.text:
**突破！** 两个重要发现：
1. `build.twin.so` 是**真正**的 Twin REST API，有完整的 `/v1/agents`、`/v1/agents/{id}/runs`、`/v1/agents/{id}/runs/{run_id}/events` 等端点。
2. 它明确说 **"Bearer tokens are not supported on the REST API. Use the x-api-key header"**。这是个关键协议细节。

任务书里明确指定 base 为 `api.twin.so`，但实际可用的 API 在 `build.twin.so` 且需要 `x-api-key` header 而非 Bearer。

让我**完整重做实验**——用正确的 base URL 和正确的 auth header。这会真实创建玩具 agent、启动 run、观察 interrupt、测试 8 种 probe。这是用户真正想要的实验！

operation.Set: build.twin.so 需要 x-api-key header，不是 Bearer

Text.text:
## Extracted API Paths from build.twin.so

A total of 21 API endpoints were identified, covering agents, workspaces, schedules, runs, and more. Here's the complete list with supported methods:

- `GET/POST /api/public/v1/access-api-keys`
- `DELETE /api/public/v1/access-api-keys/{key_id}`
- `GET/POST /v1/agents`
- `DELETE/GET /v1/agents/{agent_id}`
- `GET/PUT /v1/agents/{agent_id}/instructions`
- `GET /v1/agents/{agent_id}/instructions/history`
- `POST /v1/agents/{agent_id}/move`
- `GET/POST /v1/agents/{agent_id}/runs`
- `DELETE /v1/agents/{agent_id}/runs/{run_id}`
- `POST /v1/agents/{agent_id}/runs/{run_id}/cancel`
- `GET /v1/agents/{agent_id}/runs/{run_id}/events`
- `DELETE/GET/PUT /v1/agents/{agent_id}/schedule`
- `POST /v1/agents/{agent_id}/schedule/pause`
- `POST /v1/agents/{agent_id}/schedule/resume`
- `GET/POST /v1/agents/{agent_id}/webhooks`
- `DELETE/GET/PATCH /v1/agents/{agent_id}/webhooks/{webhook_id}`
- `GET /v1/me`
- `GET /v1/schedules`
- `GET/POST /v1/workspaces`
- `POST /v1/workspaces/reorder`
- `DELETE/PUT /v1/workspaces/{workspace_id}`

> Security: Uses API key authentication via the `x-api-key` header.

Text.text:
真正的 API 清单有了。关键路径：
- `POST /v1/agents` — 创建 agent
- `PUT /v1/agents/{agent_id}/instructions` — 写 instructions
- `POST /v1/agents/{agent_id}/runs` — 启动 run
- `GET /v1/agents/{agent_id}/runs/{run_id}/events` — 轮询 events
- `POST /v1/agents/{agent_id}/runs/{run_id}/cancel` — 取消 run
- `DELETE /v1/agents/{agent_id}` — 删除 agent

**没有** `messages`、`input`、`answer`、`reply`、`respond`、`resume` 端点。这正是实验要验证的点：8 种候选回传端点里有哪些真实存在。

让我先验证 me 端点能工作：

Text.text:
## API Endpoint Schemas Retrieved

Detailed structures were found for key endpoints related to agents, instructions, runs, and events.

### Create Agent (POST /v1/agents)
The request body includes optional fields like agent ID, parent agent ID, subagent flag, owner user ID, and workspace ID. Successful responses return agent details; errors like unauthorized access are handled.

> All endpoints require API key authentication.

### Update Instructions (PUT)
Updates instructions for a specific agent ID using a dedicated body schema. Returns update confirmation or error details.

---

### Start Run (POST /v1/agents/{agent_id}/runs)
Starts a run for an agent with a start body schema. Provides run response or validation errors.

### List Run Events (GET)
Retrieves events for a specific agent and run, with optional limits and pagination via after_index.

ToolOutputSummary.title: Retrieved schemas for agent create, update instructions, run start, and event list endpoints

Text.text:
## Run Schema Discovery

Located the body schema for initiating a run process.

> Key fields: `user_message` (string, optional), `run_mode` (string, optional), `skip_deploy_check` (boolean, optional).

This confirms the structure needed, with `user_message` as the primary input.

ToolOutputSummary.title: Found the correct schema for starting a run

Text.text:
Schema 清楚：
- `POST /v1/agents` body: `{is_subagent, agent_id?, workspace_id?, derived_from_agent_id?, owner_user_id?}`
- `PUT instructions` body: `{content: string}` (instructions 是一个 string，不是对象)
- `StartRunBody`: `{run_mode?, user_message?, skip_deploy_check?}`

注意 CreateAgentBody 里**没有 name/description 字段**。name 是否由 `agent_name` 自动推断？让我试。
